head.title: SQL Island - The Escape Protocol
head.teaser: Nova and Archivist Lyra search the Adventurers’ Guild database to find the parts needed to escape SQL Island.

manipulate-scene.text:
Nova and Archivist Lyra open the Adventurers’ Guild database to investigate the malfunction in the escape system. Lyra explains that each adventurer’s equipment is stored in an array column called inventory.
Before they can locate the parts needed for the shuttle, they must first inspect the database.
Task: Display all rows and columns from the table players.
